doctors.title: Meet Our Medical Experts
doctors.subtitle: Experienced specialists dedicated to providing compassionate and advanced healthcare services. All our clinicians are board-certified and active members of national trauma boards.
doctors.patientCareDesc: Focused exclusively on continuous bedside comfort

trauma.title: 24×7 Trauma Center & Emergency Care
trauma.subtitle: Immediate medical attention when every second matters. Our level-1 responsive trauma unit is located directly on the Highway transit corridor, preserving vital life-support pathways.
trauma.ambulanceFleetDesc: Active emergency transport vehicles deployed internally inside Kudra for lightning-fast transit stabilization with on-board oxygen kits.
trauma.traumaBayDesc: Immediate emergency triage resuscitation chambers fitted with shadowless operational light domes and critical care telemetry setups.
trauma.icuSupportDesc: Equipped with multi-channel vital monitors, advanced invasive ventilators, and continuous proctoring by nursing staff.
trauma.nicuSupportDesc: Sterilized Level-II neonatological warmers, phototherapy panels, and pediatric critical care staff alert for immediate stabilization.
trauma.intakeDesc: Direct dispatch triage officer answers instantly, preparing telemetry and ambulance queues.
trauma.dispatchDesc: Immediate team launch equipped with on-board oxygen and trauma technician supports.
trauma.assessmentDesc: In-transit vitals streamed straight to our emergency surgeons in Sakari Mod.
trauma.surgeryDesc: Direct bypass into advanced operating theatre suites omitting any waiting-room hold.

facilities.title: Our Facilities
facilities.subtitle: State-of-the-art infrastructure supporting comprehensive healthcare delivery
facilities.ambulanceServiceDesc: Swift, fully-equipped 24/7 responder ambulances equipped with onboard oxygen beds and critical pre-hospital assistance.
facilities.digitalXrayDesc: High-frequency digital radiography for immediate structural imaging with strictly optimized low radiation exposure.
facilities.pathologyLabDesc: Fully automated diagnostic lab analyzing critical hematology, biochemistry, and pathological blood metrics rapidly.
facilities.ultrasoundDesc: High-resolution Obstetrical, pelvic and Color Doppler evaluations safeguarding prenatal and maternal safety lines.
facilities.traumaCenterDesc: 24/7 dedicated emergency theater equipped for neural, abdominal, and major orthopedic golden-hour interventions.
facilities.icuDesc: Motorized intensive therapy units with continuous nursing monitors, multiparameter telemetry, and emergency vents.
facilities.nicuDesc: Sterile baby incubators, pediatric monitors, and thermal therapy protective lanes for premature new-born protection.
facilities.iccuDesc: Intensive Coronary Care unit utilizing modern defibrillator devices and automated telemetry for cardiac attacks.
facilities.vaccinationDesc: Universal pediatric immunization schedules conducted under expert guidance to protect children against epidemics.
facilities.emergencyDesc: Swift triage system ensuring critical trauma entries receive immediate medical attention without upfront paperwork.
facilities.generalWardDesc: Comfortable, highly hygienic, and spacious inpatient suites with active nursing support buttons and fresh lounges.
facilities.advanceOTDesc: Highly sterile central operation suite equipped with shadowless clinical lamps and continuous anesthetic consoles.

ecosystem.title: Where Quality Healthcare
ecosystem.subtitle: A high-fidelity academic partnership that embeds certified clinical trainees inside a busy Multi-Speciality Hospital to forge confident nursing experts.
ecosystem.hospitalDesc: A prominent 100-bed multi-speciality tertiary healthcare venue equipped with intensive medical units, expert clinical departments, and general beds.
ecosystem.collegeDesc: An accredited 3-year diploma nursing school providing theoretical education, clinical rotations, and hospital-integrated practical training.

nursing.title: Nursing College
nursing.dual: Mata Bhagyamani Devi Hospital & Ramdhari Singh Memorial Nursing College
nursing.subtitle: Students receive real clinical exposure, hospital-based practical learning and professional healthcare training through our integrated healthcare ecosystem. Learn diagnostics, triage routines, and major ICU/NICU operations under direct mentorship of active physicians.
nursing.hours: 1,500+ direct proctored medical rotation clinical hours inside 100-bed wards.
nursing.anmEligibility: 10+2 Pass in any stream (Arts / Science / Commerce)
nursing.anmAudience: Recommended for Female Candidates looking for direct job security
nursing.anmDesc: Ground-up clinical certificate centered on maternal healthcare, rural pharmacology, vaccine logistics, sanitisation protocols, and child nutrition schemes.
nursing.gnmEligibility: 10+2 with PCB (Science Stream and minimum 40% aggregate)
nursing.gnmAudience: Rigorous staff nursing education with advanced medical procedures
nursing.gnmDesc: Advanced technical diploma preparing candidates to act as critical care nursing staff, assisting surgical operations, administering complex therapies, and managing acute wards.
nursing.paraAudience: All Candidates interested in laboratory and surgical assistance
nursing.paraDesc: Direct hospital skills learning: medical lab assistance, wound dressing, radiography assistance, orthopaedic plaster setting, and ICU support.
nursing.bscEligibility: 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, Biology & English (Min 45% standard)
nursing.bscAudience: Bachelors degree path for global research & healthcare leadership
nursing.bscDesc: The gold-standard nursing degree combining medical science research, hospital staff administration, diagnostic analytics, and modern medical electronics usage.
nursing.hostelDesc: Safe, secure and comfortable accommodation available for students.
nursing.scholarshipDesc: Guidance and assistance available for eligible student scholarship programs.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.ayushmanBharatAnswer: Yes, we are fully empanelled under PM-JAY (Ayushman Bharat) scheme with zero-deposit treatment for eligible families.
faq.emergency24x7Answer: Yes, our Level-1 trauma center operates round-the-clock with dedicated teams for all emergencies.
faq.ambulanceService: What is the ambulance response time?
faq.ambulanceServiceAnswer: Our GPS-tracked ambulances typically respond within 15-20 minutes of the call. Call: 7250853234
